name: The Citizens Bank Of Edina
description_short: The Citizens Bank of Edina is a community bank in Edina, Missouri offering checking, savings, online banking, and mobile banking services with a focus on personalized customer service.
description_long:
The Citizens Bank of Edina is a locally-operated bank headquartered in Edina, Missouri at 117 S. Main Street. The institution positions itself as a community-focused financial provider, emphasizing personal service and local relationships. Based on available website information, the bank has been in operation and maintains a physical presence with both lobby and drive-thru services. The bank's stated philosophy is to be "large enough to serve you, yet small enough to care," reflecting a commitment to serving local financial needs.

The Citizens Bank of Edina offers core banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, and certificate of deposit (CD) products. The bank provides online banking services that enable customers to pay bills and transfer money remotely through a registered account portal. Mobile banking is available through a downloadable app that customers can access after signing up with a representative. The bank operates an ATM network with branch locator functionality available on their website. Customer support is available via phone at 660-397-2266 and in-person at their main office location.

The bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on well-trained staff and personalized service standards. Their marketing language focuses on exceeding customer expectations and providing a "refreshing change of pace" compared to larger institutions. The institution serves the Edina area with extended drive-thru hours (including Saturday morning and Friday evening service until 6 p.m.) to accommodate customer schedules, and maintains traditional lobby hours Monday through Friday.

The website provides limited detailed information about specific product features, interest rates, fees, or competitive positioning. No information is available regarding FDIC insurance coverage, minimum deposit requirements, APY rates, or detailed product comparisons. The bank's digital presence is minimal, with the website functioning primarily as a basic information portal rather than a comprehensive product showcase. Customers seeking detailed product specifications or rate information would need to contact the bank directly by phone or visit in person. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile app registration through customer representatives
pros: Extended drive-thru hours including Saturday morning (8 a.m. - 12 p.m.) and Friday until 6 p.m. for working customers
Online banking available for remote bill payment and money transfers
Mobile banking app available for customers who prefer smartphone access
Local community bank with emphasis on personalized customer service
ATM network with branch locator tool on website
Direct phone contact available (660-397-2266) and in-person service at main office
Established local institution in Edina, Missouri serving the community
cons: Limited website information about product features, rates, fees, or account minimums
Lobby hours restricted to Monday-Friday 8:30 a.m. - 3:30 p.m., closed weekends
No online account opening option mentioned; customers must visit branch or contact representative to register
Minimal digital banking information or product details available on website
Single physical location mentioned; unclear if additional branches exist despite website mentioning 'branch locator'
best_for: Edina, Missouri residents seeking local community banking with personalized service
Customers who value in-person relationships and local decision-making over large-bank convenience
People with traditional banking needs (checking, savings, CDs) in the Edina area
Business customers seeking community-focused local banking relationships
diagnosis: The Citizens Bank of Edina is best suited for Edina, Missouri residents seeking traditional community banking services with personalized staff interaction. The primary caveat is that the bank provides minimal online product information, requiring customers to contact the bank directly or visit in person to learn about specific rates, fees, and account features before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
